---
title: "Amelia Jane Oswald"
---

## Amelia Jane Oswald

**Dates:** (1800-1892)

**Maiden name:** (Murray), Lady

### Description

mother of Elizabeth Jane Oswald

### Biography

She ws the second wife and widow of General Sir John Oswald (1777-1840) of Dunnikier.

### Letters

- Letter from June 26th [?1882[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
